# Nexora

> Nexora is a B2B SaaS marketplace for Morocco's health sector — pharmaceuticals, supplements, medical herbs, medical supplies, and sports nutrition. Vendors list wholesale catalogs and run their business (orders, invoices, inventory, loyalty) from one dashboard; buyers (pharmacies, clinics, retailers) source from verified suppliers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Nexora is and who it's for.
- [Vendor directory](/vendors): Browse verified suppliers in Morocco's health sector.
- [Pricing](/pricing): SaaS plans for vendors.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing account login.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a buyer or vendor account.
- [Vendor sign in](/vendor-login): Vendor portal login.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable URL list including vendor stores and product pages.
